result.stdout:
Description:
  Increment Product, Assembly, and File versions for specified C# project. This utility can be used for both SDK and .net formats at the same time. Exit codes: 0 = success, 1 = errors, 78 = warnings

Usage:
  AssemblyVersionIncrementer [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file> (REQUIRED)                                        The file to process.
  -b, --backup                                                        Keep old version of file as backup [default: False]
  -q, --quiet                                                         Quiet operation - do not print messages [default: False]
  --force                                                             Add version information if not present in the file [default: False]
  -sv, --set-version <set-version>                                    Set specific version instead of incrementing (e.g. '1.2.3') []
  -sib, --set-increment-by <set-increment-by>                         Sets the value for the increment (i.e. by how much the version string should be incremented) [default: 1]
  -sip, --set-increment-position <set-increment-position> (REQUIRED)  Zero-based index of position within the version string to increment, e.g. if version string is '1.2.3' and increment position is set to 1, this will increment number '2' from the version string)
  --version                                                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                      Show help and usage information
